title: Argentinian Beef Sandwich
description: A classic Argentinean sandwich recipe featuring grilled beef and served with chimichurri sauce.

ingredients.name: Argentinian beef
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality cut like flank steak or skirt steak.

ingredients.name: peppery red wine vinegar
ingredients.notes: For adding flavor to the chimichurri sauce.

ingredients.name: sandwich bread
ingredients.notes: Use a crusty bread like baguette or ciabatta.

ingredients.name: chimichurri sauce
ingredients.notes: See recipe below for chimichurri sauce ingredients and instructions.

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove the beef from the marinade and grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the beef rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Toast the bread slices on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the sandwiches by spreading chimichurri sauce on the toasted bread, then topping with sliced beef and chopped parsley.
